description: Perfect for Sports lovers, this shoe from fila offers absolute cushioned comfort without compromising on style. With its great looks and comfort wear, it also makes for a great everyday shoe.UpperMeshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for supportive, breathable comfortPerforations for enhanced ventilationPadded and meshed tongue and collar for all-day breathable, snug comfortLace-up system for a customised FitMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for all-day sweat-free cushioned comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone pattern grooves for ultimate grip and tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180 degree movement of the footshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
